title: Junior Project Manager
required_skills: Bachelor's degree in Business, Management, or related field
Attention to detail and documentation accuracy
bonus_skills: Familiarity with project management tools or tracking systems
matched_skills: Project management principles and methodologies (PMO at HSBC, Agile Scrum at Hapag-Lloyd)
Organizational and time management skills (6 workstreams coordination, sprint ceremonies)
Multi-task and priority coordination (cross-functional stakeholder management)
Attention to detail and documentation accuracy (C-level reporting, project documentation)
Communication and collaboration skills (C-suite reporting, stakeholder management)
Analytical thinking and problem-solving (KPI framework design, Power BI PL-300)
Project management tools familiarity (Microsoft Power BI, Agile/Scrum tooling)
missing_skills: Bachelor's degree not explicitly confirmed in CV summary
key_requirements: Assist in developing project plans, timelines, and task assignments
Coordinate project activities and track progress against milestones
Monitor schedules and identify potential delays or risks
Support stakeholder communication and prepare status reports
Organize meetings, maintain agendas, and record action items
cv_highlights: PMO at HSBC managing USD 8M digital transformation programme across 6 workstreams
Project Coordination at Hapag-Lloyd with Agile sprint planning and KPI reporting
Microsoft Power BI Certified (PL-300) — data storytelling and performance reporting
C-suite reporting and cross-functional stakeholder coordination experience
Multi-market coverage across EMEA and APAC
gaps: Role is junior-level; Boru's experience (PMO, USD 8M programme) significantly exceeds the stated scope — may raise over-qualification concerns
JD is highly generic with no industry or tool specifics — limited opportunity to differentiate with specialized skills
No mention of specific tools (e.g., Jira, Asana, MS Project) — cannot tailor tool-specific experience precisely
recommended_emphasis: Highlight coordination and tracking mechanics (milestone tracking, risk escalation, status reporting) to align with junior PM framing
Lead with Hapag-Lloyd Agile sprint role as most role-appropriate experience (scope matches junior PM duties)
Mention Power BI as a project tracking and reporting tool to address 'project management tools' requirement
Emphasize structured documentation and meeting facilitation (agendas, action items) from HSBC PMO experience
Frame seniority as 'breadth of exposure' rather than pure seniority to avoid over-qualification perception
recommendation: Apply — strong skills match on all core requirements. However, the generic JD and junior-level framing relative to Boru's actual experience reduce strategic priority. Best positioned as a stepping-stone or opportunistic application. Tailor the CV to emphasize coordination and tracking outputs rather than programme-level ownership.
